commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Feishu `messaging.resolveInboundConversation` resolver for topic, sender-scoped topic, and direct conversations, plus Feishu channel tests for those cases.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's ACP thread-binding path calls `resolveInboundConversationResolution`, while Feishu currently lacks a plugin-owned inbound resolver, so topic grammar falls back to generic conversation parsing unless a resolver is added.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or Feishu-capable maintainer proof is needed before merge; this is not a safe automated repair task because automation cannot prove the contributor's live Feishu/Lark workspace.

target.title: fix(feishu): preserve ACP topic conversation bindings
target.body:
## Summary
- Refreshes #50943 onto current `openclaw/main` as a narrow Feishu plugin fix.
- Adds Feishu `messaging.resolveInboundConversation` so ACP thread binding uses plugin-owned topic conversation grammar.
- Covers topic, sender-scoped topic, and direct conversation resolution in Feishu channel tests.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/channel.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: ACP session thread binding now resolves Feishu/Lark topic conversations through the Feishu plugin instead of generic fallback parsing.
Real environment tested: local source checkout with refreshed dependencies from `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` using temporary `PNPM_HOME=/tmp/openclaw-pnpm-home`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/channel.test.ts` and `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: Feishu channel tests passed 57/57 and ACP spawn tests passed 110/110.
Observed result after fix: `chat:oc_group_chat` + `threadId=om_topic_root` resolves to `oc_group_chat:topic:om_topic_root` with `parentConversationId=oc_group_chat`; sender-scoped topic conversations normalize to the same topic binding.
What was not tested: live Feishu/Lark runtime delivery was not exercised in this local pass.
